name: Succubus Princess TF / Transformation
description: (CW: Succubus Transformation, Latex) This is not what you expected to see after you died. Rather than being greeted by pearly gates, you instead saw fire and brimstone- but instead of being burned in its depths, you looked over it as its ruler. You now have the nude, latex-skinned form of a succubus- and apparently, you are the crown princess of Hell. Everyone is calling you Lilith, and talking about how you're 'finally back'... Just who WERE you before you were born? (Update: New image to comply with policy changes. Doesn't quite fit the lore anymore, though...)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
